title: Proxy attribution chain forgery
notes: CONFIRMED: noteProxyOperationWithState allows any app to construct a forged attribution chain (self -> any victim). verifyIncomingProxyUid only validates the proxy source UID matches caller, NOT the 'next' (victim) UID. No caller-target relationship check. Shell test: successfully injected COARSE_LOCATION and CAMERA ops into GMS (uid=10206) history with proxy info. lastProxyInfo recorded. Untrusted flags (4/16) used instead of trusted (2/8) but operation still recorded. Code analysis confirms unprivileged app can succeed: z4=false, z5=false, but noteOperationUnchecked still called. IMPACT: Privacy Dashboard poisoning — fake permission access records for any app. Potential for user confusion/alarm.
